name: mango-lsp
description: LSP Claude Code plugin store for TypeScript (tsgo), Biome, YAML, Vue, Svelte, Astro, Markdown, and Bash.

plugins.name: tsgo-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript and JavaScript code intelligence via tsgo.

plugins.name: biome-lsp
plugins.description: Biome language server for JavaScript and TypeScript diagnostics and code actions.

plugins.name: biome-web-lsp
plugins.description: Biome language server for JSON, CSS, and HTML diagnostics and code actions.

plugins.name: yaml-lsp
plugins.description: YAML language server for YAML documents and schema-aware editing.

plugins.name: vue-lsp
plugins.description: Vue language server for Vue single-file components.

plugins.name: svelte-lsp
plugins.description: Svelte language server for Svelte components.

plugins.name: astro-lsp
plugins.description: Astro language server for Astro components.

plugins.name: marksman-lsp
plugins.description: Marksman language server for Markdown documents.

plugins.name: bash-lsp
plugins.description: Bash language server for shell scripts.
